overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom showing Link exploring the Eldin Mountains. The clip begins at night with a dark blue sky and transitions to bright daylight, revealing volcanic terrain, floating sky islands, and the 'Isle of Rabac' location.

scene_state.functional_zone: volcanic plain with prominent rock spire at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across dark volcanic terrain toward a tall rock spire in the distance

entered.detail: tall thin rock formation rising prominently from the volcanic ground
dark cracked volcanic rock terrain covering the ground
distant mountain silhouette against the night sky
distant mountain silhouette against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Link walks through a dark volcanic landscape at night, approaching a tall rock spire that dominates the center of the view. The terrain is cracked and barren, with distant mountains visible on the horizon under a deep blue night sky.

events.description: passes the tall rock spire and approaches a steaming body of water with distant fire lights visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shore beside a steaming body of water, heading toward distant orange lights

entered.detail: steaming body of water along the right side of the path
large rock cliff face on the left side
steam rising from vents in the volcanic ground
orange glowing lights visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the tall spire, Link continues along a steaming shoreline at night. A body of water emits mist on the right while rocky cliffs rise on the left, with mysterious orange lights glowing in the far distance.

events.description: abrupt transition from night to day with bright sun rising over the mountains
character stops walking and pans camera to survey the landscape and sky islands

agents.ego_description: standing still and panning the camera to observe the mountain peaks, floating sky islands, and bright sun

entered.detail: large mountain with red glowing crater at the peak
floating island with vegetation suspended in the sky
floating island with structure visible in the distance
small stone tower structure on a rocky hill
bright sun shining in the clear sky

segments.scene_description: Time suddenly shifts from night to day with a bright flash, revealing the Eldin Mountains in daylight. Link stops to pan the camera across the landscape, taking in the view of a volcano with a red glowing crater, multiple floating sky islands, and a bright sun overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Isle of Rabac volcanic field with red vegetation

events.description: location text 'Isle of Rabac' appears on screen identifying the Eldin Mountains area

agents.ego_description: walking through the volcanic landscape toward red vegetation and tall rock formations

entered.detail: red glowing plants and flowers growing on the volcanic soil
tall pointed rock formation rising in the distance
natural rock arch formation on the right side

segments.scene_description: Link resumes walking through the sunlit volcanic terrain of the Isle of Rabac, passing red glowing vegetation and heading toward tall rock pinnacles. Steam rises from the ground as floating sky islands drift slowly across the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a barren volcanic landscape that transforms from a deep nocturnal blue into a brilliant, sunlit day. It begins with Link traversing cracked terrain toward a dominating rock spire under a dark night sky. As he passes the spire, the camera moves along a steaming shoreline where mist rises from the water and mysterious orange lights glow in the distance. The scene then shifts abruptly with a bright flash of light that turns night into day, prompting a panoramic view of a volcano with a glowing red crater and floating sky islands beneath a bright sun. Finally, the camera follows Link as he resumes his walk across the Isle of Rabac, passing red glowing vegetation and rising steam while heading toward tall rock pinnacles.
